Document:
# Roleplay Rule 2 - Roleplay a character that fits into the world Make an effort to roleplay a believable character that acts in line with the game world.
Communicate as you would in person, & do not use textspeak. Speak in full sentences.
Remember that other player’s characters’ beliefs and convictions may not match their real ones. Draw a line between yourself and your character.
Your character should understand that revival is not guaranteed and they should value their life when necessary.
Character names must follow species naming standards unless approved by an admin, or a realistic in-character reason is given. As long as a character follows the naming standards for any species not dependent on their species, a name is acceptable.
Honorifics, such as Mr., Doctor, and Mrs. are prohibited in names. Clowns, Lawyers, Chaplains, Mimes, & Musicians are exempt from these standards and have more freedom to make a “stage name.”
